chat.greeting: Hello! I'm Matteo's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his professional background, skills, or experience!
chat.error: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
about.title: About
about.bio: Senior software engineer, 8+ years building production systems across aviation, high-traffic consumer platforms, and retail. One of the principal engineers on a greenfield pilot-training platform at Pilatus Aircraft, shipped on-premise to air-force bases. Passionate about programming since childhood, with additional interests in finance and stock markets, motorcycles, psychology, and fitness.
about.education.title: Education
about.education.1: B.Sc. in Computer Science, Unitelma Sapienza University, Rome (2018–2021) (not completed)
about.education.2: Diploma in Business Information Systems, Istituto E. Fermi (2012–2017)
about.learning.title: Continuous Learning
about.learning.1: Algorithms, Data Structures & System Design — neetcode.io
about.learning.2: Backend, Database & Operating Systems fundamentals — Hussein Nasser
about.learning.3: Master Microservices with Spring Boot & Spring Cloud — in28Minutes
about.learning.4: Ultimate Rust Crash Course — Nathan Stocks
skills.title: Core Competencies
skills.1: Languages & Runtimes: TypeScript, Node.js, PHP, .NET, Java
skills.2: Frontend & Mobile: React 19, Next.js, React Native (Expo), Module Federation microfrontends
skills.3: Backend & APIs: Laravel, Hono, Express, tRPC, REST; queue-based workers (BullMQ, Redis)
skills.4: Data & Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server, Redis, Prisma ORM; Docker, Turborepo, Vercel, Railway
skills.5: AI & Search: LLM agents, structured outputs, streaming; RAG with embeddings, BM25, RRF, cross-encoder reranking
skills.6: Quality & Security: Vitest, end-to-end testing, Sentry; OWASP, OAuth/JWT/session authentication
projects.title: Projects
projects.gymtree.title: GymTree
projects.gymtree.desc: Solo-built fitness platform, in App Store review. Full-stack across backend API, coach web, trainee mobile app, marketing site, and background workers.
projects.claudeLocalDocs.title: claude-local-docs
projects.claudeLocalDocs.desc: Open-source Claude Code plugin. Local-first docs indexer with vector embeddings, BM25, Reciprocal Rank Fusion, and cross-encoder reranking.
projects.portfolio.title: Cockpit Portfolio
projects.portfolio.desc: This website. Interactive 3D cockpit portfolio built with Next.js 16, Three.js, and a streaming OpenAI assistant.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.cta: I'm open to new opportunities. Let's connect!
hero.name: I'm Matteo
experience.context.title: Context
experience.role.title: My Role
experience.hero.scope.title: WHAT I WORKED ON
experience.ownership.title: Ownership
experience.stack.title: Stack
experience.01.hero.title: Galileo SpA
experience.01.role.body:
Full-stack developer on a corporate platform covering catalog, media, and logistics for a retailer with **60+ physical stores** and **40,000+ SKUs**.

Integrated the **IBM AS/400** with the web, serving live product data to the intranet and downstream systems.

Built the B2B catalog, PDF/print pipeline, multimedia asset library, and barcode/SKU tooling for warehouse pick/pack and inventory.
experience.01.ownership.1:
Queried the **IBM AS/400** from the web platform.
Served **40,000+ SKUs** live to the intranet and downstream systems.
experience.01.ownership.2:
Built the **B2B catalog** — dealer area, online orders, pricing.
Serving the network of **60+ physical stores**.
experience.01.ownership.3:
Built the **multimedia asset library**.
With batch jobs rebuilding media derivatives and search indexes.
experience.01.ownership.4:
Shipped the **barcode/SKU tooling** for warehouse pick/pack.
And the **PDF/print pipeline** for catalogs, price lists, and labels.
experience.02.hero.title: Hexa Credit Care
experience.02.role.body:
Full-stack developer on a **multi-tenant CRM** for **300 call-center operators** in credit recovery and B2C sales, with enterprise clients like **Fastweb** and **Sorgenia**.

Designed the **multi-tenant architecture** isolating per-client configuration and data on a single codebase.

Shipped the **real-time reporting layer** powering operator and manager dashboards.
experience.02.ownership.1:
Designed the **multi-tenant architecture**.
Isolating per-client configuration and data on a single codebase.
experience.02.ownership.2:
Shipped the **real-time reporting** layer.
Powering operator and manager dashboards.
experience.02.ownership.3:
Built the **credit-recovery payment flow** — bonifici, RID, incassi.
And the integrations with enterprise client systems like **Fastweb** and **Sorgenia**.
experience.02.ownership.4:
**Grew from junior to senior** developer over three years.
On a 2–3 person team.
experience.03.hero.title: Pilatus Aircraft
experience.03.role.body:
One of the **principal engineers** on a **greenfield pilot-training platform**.

Shipped on-premise to **Swiss and foreign air-force bases** under **defense-industry QA**.

I focus mainly on the platform frontend, built on a pre-decided **microfrontend** architecture, and on the isolated build and deploy pipelines that deliver each subsystem independently into **air-gapped environments**.
experience.03.ownership.1:
Built the **platform frontend** on a pre-decided **microfrontend** architecture.
Across the user-facing components of the application.
experience.03.ownership.2:
Shipped **isolated build and deploy pipelines**.
They deliver each subsystem independently into **air-gapped environments**.
experience.03.ownership.3:
**Owner of the design system** used by the 6-engineer frontend team.
**Primary reviewer** on frontend code.
experience.03.ownership.4: Conducts **hiring interviews and onboarding** for new frontend engineers.
experience.04.hero.title: DonTouch
experience.04.context.stack.value: Laravel, PHP, Microsoft SQL Server, Redis
experience.04.role.body:
Backend engineer on a **high-traffic consumer directory** with a subscription advertiser model.

**2M+ registered users** and **10k+ peak concurrent**.

Worked on the **public-site ranking pipeline** that feeds the SSG build, and built the **advertiser-side mobile backend**.
experience.04.ownership.1:
Extended the **public-site ranking pipeline**.
Writes to **Redis** and feeds the **SSG build** serving **millions of pageviews per day**.
experience.04.ownership.2:
Built the **advertiser-side mobile backend**.
Geographic subscriptions, pause and resume flows, payment processing.
experience.04.ownership.3:
Designed the schema and optimized **transactional queries**.
On the paid-user side, under peak load.
experience.04.ownership.4: Scaled to **2M+ registered users** and **10k+ advertisers** at peak.
experience.04.stack.body: Laravel · PHP · Microsoft SQL Server · Redis
experience.05.hero.title: GymTree
experience.05.role.body:
**Sole developer** of a fitness platform.

Built the **backend API, coach web console, trainee mobile app**, and a **background worker fleet**.

The production AI powers **persistent coach chat** and generates **personalized workout and nutrition plans**.
experience.05.ownership.1:
**AI coach chat** in production.
Persistent conversations and personalized workout/nutrition plan generation.
experience.05.ownership.2:
Full-stack ownership across backend, mobile, and web.
Stack: **Hono**, **Prisma**, **PostgreSQL**, **Redis**, **BullMQ** for background jobs.
experience.05.ownership.4: Workout and nutrition plans generated via **structured output from LLMs**.
experience.05.stack.body: TypeScript · Hono · Prisma · PostgreSQL · Redis · Expo
